articles.headline: Paris Saint-Germain squad rotation key to trophy hunt - Luis Enrique
articles.description: Paris Saint-Germain boss Luis Enrique admits he will need to manage his squad carefully as the club chase Ligue 1 and Champions League glory during an intense run-in.

articles.headline: Arne Slot: Liverpool can use early Champions League exit in Premier League push
articles.description: Arne Slot said Liverpool's exit from the Champions League could help them in their quest to qualify for the competition again next season.

images.name: Alexis Mac Allister of Liverpool FC looks disappointed, dejected, frustrated  [1296x729]
images.caption: Alexis Mac Allister of Liverpool FC looks disappointed, dejected, frustrated
images.credit: Ryan Crockett/DeFodi Images/DeFodi via Getty Images

images.name: How will Liverpool cope without Hugo Ekitike?
images.caption: The 'FC TV' crew debate react to the news of Hugo Ekitike rupturing his Achilles against Paris Saint Germain in the UEFA Champions League.

articles.headline: Atletico Madrid's Ademola Lookman praises Antoine Griezmann's 'amazing' pass
articles.description: Ademola Lookman heaped praise on Antoine Griezmann's technique in sending Marcos Llorente through on the break for his goal against Barcelona in the UEFA Champions League.

images.name: Barca woe vs Atleti_260212 [1296x729]
images.caption: Atleti players celebrate after scoring a goal against Barcelona in the Copa del Rey.
images.alt: Atleti players celebrate after scoring a goal against Barcelona in the Copa del Rey.

images.name: Lookman: Diego Simeone demands more of me!
images.caption: Ademola Lookman reveals how Atletico boss Diego Simeone is helping bring out the best in him.

articles.headline: Who are top scorers in the Champions League 2025/26? Where does Harry Kane rank?
articles.description: ESPN takes a look at the top goalscorers in the current season and all-time in the UEFA Champions League.

images.name: Harry Kane reflects on Bayern's 'special night' vs. Real Madrid
images.caption: Harry Kane speaks about Bayern Munich's 4-3 win over Real Madrid and previews their Champions League semifinal vs. PSG

articles.headline: Was Eduardo Camavinga wrongfully sent off vs. Bayern Munich?
articles.description: The 'FC TV' crew debate if Eduardo Camavinga was wrongly sent off against Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League.

images.name: Was Eduardo Camavinga wrongfully sent off vs. Bayern Munich?
images.caption: The 'FC TV' crew debate if Eduardo Camavinga was wrongly sent off against Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League.

articles.headline: Barcelona file fresh UEFA complaint over Champions League refs
articles.description: Barcelona have filed a second complaint to UEFA complaining that refereeing standards were not complied with in their Champions League quarterfinal exit to Atlético Madrid.

images.name: Barcelona complain to ref [1296x729]
images.caption: Barcelona players argue after referee Clément Turpin gave a red card to Eric García.
images.alt: Barcelona players argue after the referee gave a red card to Barcelona's Spanish defender #24 Eric Garcia  during the UEFA Champions League quarter final second leg football match between Club Atletico de Madrid and FC Barcelona at Metropolitano Stadium i
images.credit: Javier SORIANO / AFP via Getty Images

images.name: Hansi Flick: We deserved to be in the semifinal
images.caption: Hansi Flick believes Barcelona deserve to be in the semifinal of the UEFA Champions League despite being knocked out to Atlético Madrid.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Attempt saved. Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner. Assisted by Miguel.
Peer Kluge (Schalke) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Éver Banega (Valencia).
Offside, Schalke. Lukas Schmitz tries a through ball, but Klaas-Jan Huntelaar is caught offside.
Hand ball by Klaas-Jan Huntelaar (Schalke).
Peer Kluge (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Tino Costa (Valencia).
Delay in match Peer Kluge (Schalke) because of an injury.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Tino Costa.
Offside, Valencia. David Navarro tries a through ball, but Roberto Soldado is caught offside.
Offside, Schalke. Peer Kluge tries a through ball, but Klaas-Jan Huntelaar is caught offside.
Foul by Atsuto Uchida (Schalke).
Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Offside, Valencia. Éver Banega tries a through ball, but Aritz Aduriz is caught offside.
José Jurado (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Miguel (Valencia).
Foul by Joel Matip (Schalke).
Alejandro Domínguez (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Joel Matip (Schalke) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Valencia 1, Schalke 0. Roberto Soldado (Valencia) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jérémy Mathieu with a cross.
Offside, Valencia. Tino Costa tries a through ball, but Aritz Aduriz is caught offside.
Peer Kluge (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Roberto Soldado (Valencia).
Attempt blocked. Jefferson Farfán (Schalke) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Jérémy Mathieu.
Attempt blocked. Peer Kluge (Schalke) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Ricardo Costa.
Hand ball by José Jurado (Schalke).
Foul by Joel Matip (Schalke).
Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Attempt saved. Peer Kluge (Schalke) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top right corner. Assisted by Atsuto Uchida with a cross.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Guaita.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Tino Costa.
Attempt saved. Éver Banega (Valencia) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner.
Attempt missed. Roberto Soldado (Valencia) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Miguel with a cross.
Foul by Peer Kluge (Schalke).
Éver Banega (Valencia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Tino Costa following a set piece situation.
Raúl (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Tino Costa (Valencia).
Attempt saved. Tino Costa (Valencia) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner.
Foul by Jefferson Farfán (Schalke).
Tino Costa (Valencia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Benedikt Höwedes (Schalke).
Roberto Soldado (Valencia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Alejandro Domínguez (Valencia) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high from a direct free kick.
Attempt blocked. Klaas-Jan Huntelaar (Schalke) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Raúl.
Foul by Raúl (Schalke).
David Navarro (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Offside, Schalke. Peer Kluge tries a through ball, but Klaas-Jan Huntelaar is caught offside.
First Half ends, Valencia 1, Schalke 0.
Second Half begins Valencia 1, Schalke 0.
Foul by Peer Kluge (Schalke).
Éver Banega (Valencia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Alejandro Domínguez (Valencia) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Aritz Aduriz.
Corner,  Valencia. Conceded by Benedikt Höwedes.
Attempt missed. Tino Costa (Valencia) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Éver Banega with a cross following a corner.
Attempt missed. Éver Banega (Valencia) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is close, but misses to the left.
Attempt saved. Raúl (Schalke) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner. Assisted by Manuel Neuer.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Guaita.
Klaas-Jan Huntelaar (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Ricardo Costa (Valencia).
Foul by Lukas Schmitz (Schalke).
Éver Banega (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Corner,  Valencia. Conceded by Christoph Metzelder.
Attempt saved. Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner. Assisted by Tino Costa.
Corner,  Valencia. Conceded by Benedikt Höwedes.
Attempt missed. Raúl (Schalke) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Jefferson Farfán with a cross.
Foul by Christoph Metzelder (Schalke).
Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Raúl (Schalke).
David Navarro (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Hand ball by Joel Matip (Schalke).
Peer Kluge (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Alejandro Domínguez (Valencia).
Corner,  Valencia. Conceded by Atsuto Uchida.
Offside, Valencia. Miguel tries a through ball, but Ricardo Costa is caught offside.
Ricardo Costa (Valencia) is shown the yellow card.
Peer Kluge (Schalke) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Alejandro Domínguez (Valencia).
Goal!  Valencia 1, Schalke 1. Raúl (Schalke) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by José Jurado with a cross.
Foul by Lukas Schmitz (Schalke).
Roberto Soldado (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Lukas Schmitz (Schalke) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Klaas-Jan Huntelaar (Schalke) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by David Navarro (Valencia).
Attempt saved. Lukas Schmitz (Schalke) left footed shot from long range on the right is saved in the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Valencia. Joaquín midfielder replaces Alejandro Domínguez.
Substitution, Valencia. Vicente midfielder replaces Éver Banega.
Foul by Klaas-Jan Huntelaar (Schalke).
Tino Costa (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
Foul by Raúl (Schalke).
Tino Costa (Valencia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Peer Kluge (Schalke).
Tino Costa (Valencia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Joaquín (Valencia) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Aritz Aduriz with a cross.
Attempt blocked. Aritz Aduriz (Valencia) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Vicente with a through ball.
Corner,  Valencia. Conceded by Christoph Metzelder.
Manuel Neuer (Schalke) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Schalke. Julian Draxler midfielder replaces Jefferson Farfán.
Substitution, Valencia. Jordi Alba midfielder replaces Jérémy Mathieu.
Foul by José Jurado (Schalke).
Jordi Alba (Valencia) wins a free kick in his own half.
José Jurado (Schalke) is shown the yellow card.
Foul by Atsuto Uchida (Schalke).
Jordi Alba (Valencia) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt saved. Ricardo Costa (Valencia) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal. Assisted by Miguel with a cross.
Substitution, Schalke. Edu forward replaces José Jurado.
Attempt missed. Tino Costa (Valencia) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Joaquín with a cross.
Substitution, Schalke. Hao Junmin midfielder replaces Klaas-Jan Huntelaar.
Attempt saved. Hao Junmin (Schalke) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner. Assisted by Raúl.
Corner,  Schalke. Conceded by Guaita.
Foul by Benedikt Höwedes (Schalke).
